data.title: debug-everything: fix-bug completes post-compaction -> session stops instead of continuing to next bug
data.description:
## Actual Behavior
When /dso:debug-everything runs a fix-bug sub-agent and an auto-compact occurs mid-session, debug-everything stops after that single fix-bug execution completes rather than continuing to the next open bug. The orchestration loop exits prematurely.

## Expected Behavior
After auto-compaction, debug-everything should resume its loop, re-query for remaining open bugs, and continue dispatching fix-bug for each one until no open bugs remain (or the cascade limit is reached).

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run /dso:debug-everything with multiple open bugs
2. Allow an auto-compact to trigger during a fix-bug sub-agent execution
3. Observe that debug-everything stops after the post-compaction fix-bug finishes instead of picking up the next bug

## Environment
- Skills: /dso:debug-everything
- Trigger: auto-compact during fix-bug sub-agent
